source_text_snapshot: The figure shows the scenario of power transmission to a user through a transmission line. The step-up transformer \( T_1 \) and the step-down transformer \( T_2 \) are both considered ideal transformers, and the resistance of the transmission line is \( R \). Which of the following statements is correct?

source_text_snapshot: In the single-phase rectifier consisting of three thyristors \(T_1\), \(T_2\), \(T_3\) and a diode \(D_1\) shown in <image>, the circuit feeds power to a \(10 \, \text{A}\) constant current load. \(T_1\) and \(T_3\) are fired at \(\alpha = 60^\circ\) and \(T_2\) is fired at \(\alpha = 240^\circ\). The reference for \(\alpha\) is the positive zero crossing of \(V_{\text{in}}\). The average voltage \(V_o\) across the load in volts is ____ (Round off to 2 decimal places).

source_text_snapshot: A Boolean digital circuit is composed using two 4-input multiplexers (M1 and M2) and one 2-input multiplexer (M3) as shown in the figure. X0-X7 are the inputs of the multiplexers M1 and M2 and could be connected to either 0 or 1. The select lines of the multiplexers are connected to Boolean variables A, B, and C as shown in figure. Which one of the following set of values of (X0, X1, X2, X3, X4, X5, X6, X7) will realize the Boolean function \( \overline{A} + \overline{A} \cdot \overline{C} + A \cdot \overline{B} \cdot C \)?

Which one of the following set of values of (X0, X1, X2, X3, X4, X5, X6, X7) will realize the Boolean function \( \overline{A} + \overline{A} \cdot \overline{C} + A \cdot \overline{B} \cdot C \)?

To realize the Boolean function \(\overline{A} + \overline{A} \cdot \overline{C} + A \cdot \overline{B} \cdot C\), what should be the value of X6?

source_text_snapshot: A Boolean digital circuit is composed using two 4-input multiplexers (M1 and M2) and one 2-input multiplexer (M3) as shown in the figure. X0-X7 are the inputs of the multiplexers M1 and M2 and could be connected to either 0 or 1. The select lines of the multiplexers are connected to Boolean variables A, B, and C as shown in figure. Which one of the following set of values of (X0, X1, X2, X3, X4, X5, X6, X7) will realize the Boolean function \( \overline{A} + \overline{A} \cdot \overline{C} + A \cdot \overline{B} \cdot C \)?
